since_last: 27% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.18%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.02% · Gold -1.08% · Nasdaq100 -0.75%. 27% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.18%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.18%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -7.19%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.41%, ISRG +2.92%, AVAV +2.66%, ZBRA +2.29%, OKTA +1.70%. Laggards: SKHY -7.19%, SMR -6.94%, CEVA -6.86%, ARM -6.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.41% at $135.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.41% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
